---
title: "Projects"
---

A selection of computational and research projects. *(Replace the GitHub links once the
repositories are public — and confirm with each research group what may be shared openly.)*

## CROCO ocean modeling — coral reefs of Barú
Configuration and analysis of regional ocean simulations (CROCO) for Caribbean reef systems.

[View repository →](https://github.com/USERNAME/croco-baru){.pill}

## Bioinformatics — *Hypostomus* systematics
Sequence analysis and phylogenetic systematics workflows for taxonomic identification.

[View repository →](https://github.com/USERNAME/hypostomus-systematics){.pill}

## Python for Biosciences
Notebooks from the *Python for Biosciences* specialization — data analysis and scientific computing.

[View repository →](https://github.com/USERNAME/python-biosciences){.pill}
